name: agentqa
description: Agent-driven mobile UI test automation with Appium, for iOS and Android — two skills: agentqa-init (toolchain + project setup) and agentqa-write-test (idea to a green Appium test, with behavioral memory).

interface.shortDescription: Set up, write, and run Appium UI tests for iOS and Android
interface.longDescription: Two skills that let a coding agent set up the mobile UI-testing toolchain and turn a test-case idea into a reviewed, passing Appium test — exploring the real running app, adding accessibility identifiers additively, remembering what it learns, and keeping humans at the build and review checkpoints.
defaultPrompt: Set up this repo for agent-driven Appium UI tests.
Write a UI test: logging in with a valid account lands on the home tab.
